engines.name: Virtual Analog
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Continuously variable analog waveforms with detuning and sync.

controls.harmonics: Detunes the paired oscillators through closely spaced and musical intervals.
controls.timbre: Moves through pulse-width changes and introduces oscillator synchronization.
controls.morph: Changes the shape of the variable sawtooth component.
controls.macro: Crossfades the square and variable-saw components around the stock midpoint.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Waveshaping
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A variable waveshaper for clean sines, folded tones, and hard edges.

controls.harmonics: Selects the harmonic relationship between the oscillator components.
controls.timbre: Increases wavefolding from a clean tone to dense folded spectra.
controls.morph: Changes the underlying waveform sent into the wavefolder.
controls.macro: Offsets the wavefolder symmetry from negative through centered to positive bias.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Two-op FM
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A focused two-operator FM voice spanning pure bells to metallic noise.

controls.harmonics: Selects the carrier-to-modulator frequency ratio.
controls.timbre: Raises the FM index from a pure carrier to bright sidebands.
controls.morph: Feeds the modulator back into itself for increasingly complex spectra.
controls.macro: Detunes the modulator continuously around the selected ratio.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Granular Formant
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Granular formants and filtered noise animated around the fundamental.

controls.harmonics: Sets the relationship between the fundamental and the grain clock.
controls.timbre: Moves the resonant formant above and around the fundamental.
controls.morph: Changes grain shape and the balance of tonal and noisy material.
controls.macro: Brings the carrier through the stock suppressed-carrier texture.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope and grain articulation when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Harmonic Oscillator
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A bank of additive partials with spectral balance and timbral motion.

controls.harmonics: Changes the number and distribution of active additive partials.
controls.timbre: Moves energy between low and high partial groups.
controls.morph: Tilts and animates the spectrum across the partial bank.
controls.macro: Rebalances odd and even partials around the stock midpoint.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Wavetable
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Smooth travel through an extensive collection of integrated waves.

controls.harmonics: Selects a family within the integrated wavetable collection.
controls.timbre: Moves across one dimension of the selected table.
controls.morph: Moves across the second dimension with smooth interpolation.
controls.macro: Warps oscillator phase to create new variants of the selected wave.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Chords
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Four-voice chord voicings with selectable waveforms and inversions.

controls.harmonics: Selects the chord voicing from the active chord table.
controls.timbre: Changes the waveform shared by the four chord voices.
controls.morph: Changes inversion and spacing across the chord voices.
controls.macro: Balances the two internally grouped sets of chord voices.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope and rearticulates the chord when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Speech
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Vowels, phonemes, speech synthesis, and word banks in one voice.

controls.harmonics: Selects the speech synthesis model or word-bank behavior.
controls.timbre: Moves through vowels, phonemes, or words for the selected model.
controls.morph: Changes prosody, inflection, and transitions between speech elements.
controls.macro: Moves from raw excitation through the stock voice to sharper spectral emphasis.

manual.trigger: Advances or restarts speech material according to the selected model.

engines.name: Swarm
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A cloud of detuned sawtooth oscillators for supersaws and drones.

controls.harmonics: Spreads the oscillator pitches from a tight unison to a wide swarm.
controls.timbre: Changes the number and density of active swarm particles.
controls.morph: Changes the individual oscillator shape and animation.
controls.macro: Widens the distribution of particle sizes around the stock midpoint.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope and rearticulates the swarm when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Filtered Noise
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Clocked noise and multimode filtering for pitched or diffuse spectra.

controls.harmonics: Changes the clock rate and pitch character of the noise source.
controls.timbre: Sweeps the primary multimode filter response.
controls.morph: Raises resonance from broad noise to sharply pitched bands.
controls.macro: Moves an independent filter position from low-pass toward high-pass.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Particle Noise
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Random particles excite a resonant network from sparse ticks to clouds.

controls.harmonics: Changes particle density from isolated ticks to a continuous cloud.
controls.timbre: Moves the resonant filter excited by each particle.
controls.morph: Spreads particle frequencies and timing across the texture.
controls.macro: Adds diffusion from a dry particle stream to a dense cloud.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope and particle articulation when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Inharmonic String
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A physical string model moving from clean plucks to inharmonic material.

controls.harmonics: Changes string dispersion from harmonic plucks to inharmonic material.
controls.timbre: Brightens the excitation and resonating string.
controls.morph: Changes damping from short, muted plucks to long resonances.
controls.macro: Lengthens the excitation from a short strike toward a scrape.

manual.trigger: Strikes the modeled string; unpatched TRIG allows continuous internal excitation.

engines.name: Modal Resonator
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Modal synthesis for strings, plates, tubes, bells, and struck objects.

controls.harmonics: Changes modal structure across strings, plates, tubes, and bells.
controls.timbre: Brightens the exciter and upper resonant modes.
controls.morph: Changes damping and the decay time of the resonator.
controls.macro: Focuses the exciter from broad noise toward a pitched impulse.

manual.trigger: Strikes the modeled resonator; unpatched TRIG allows continuous internal excitation.

engines.name: Analog Bass Drum
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A punchy synthesized kick with controllable tone, decay, and drive.

controls.harmonics: Changes the drum tone and oscillator character.
controls.timbre: Sets the decay from a short knock to a sustained kick.
controls.morph: Raises drive and nonlinear body in the synthesized drum.
controls.macro: Changes pitch-envelope punch from restrained to exaggerated.

manual.trigger: Fires a new bass-drum hit with velocity taken from LEVEL.

engines.name: Analog Snare
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: A modeled snare combining tuned oscillators and filtered noise.

controls.harmonics: Changes the tuning of the modeled shell oscillators.
controls.timbre: Sets the decay of the shell and noise components.
controls.morph: Balances the tuned shell against the filtered noise component.
controls.macro: Spreads the shell modes from compact to strongly inharmonic.

manual.trigger: Fires a new snare hit with velocity taken from LEVEL.

engines.name: Analog Hi-hat
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Metallic cymbal oscillators and noise shaped into crisp hi-hats.

controls.harmonics: Changes the metallic oscillator mixture and cymbal tone.
controls.timbre: Sets the decay from a tight closed hat to a longer open sound.
controls.morph: Balances the metallic oscillators against the noise component.
controls.macro: Spreads metallic oscillator frequencies from compact to widely separated.

manual.trigger: Fires a new hi-hat hit with velocity taken from LEVEL.

engines.name: VA + VCF
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Classic oscillator shapes through a resonant virtual-analog filter.

controls.harmonics: Moves through classic oscillator shapes before the filter.
controls.timbre: Sweeps the virtual-analog filter cutoff.
controls.morph: Raises filter resonance toward self-oscillating emphasis.
controls.macro: Increases oscillator and filter drive from clean to saturated.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Phase Distortion
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Casio-inspired phase distortion with animated harmonic contours.

controls.harmonics: Selects the phase-distortion waveform and contour.
controls.timbre: Raises the amount of phase distortion and harmonic brightness.
controls.morph: Changes modulation depth and motion within the phase curve.
controls.macro: Moves the modulator ratio from an octave down through unison to an octave up.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: DX7 Bank A
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: The first bank of classic six-operator FM patches stored in Plaits user data.

controls.harmonics: Selects a patch from the first built-in six-operator FM bank.
controls.timbre: Changes patch brightness by scaling operator levels.
controls.morph: Changes envelope timing and articulation across the operator network.
controls.macro: Detunes the modulator network, darkening below noon and saturating above it.

manual.trigger: Restarts the selected patch envelopes.

engines.name: DX7 Bank B
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: The second bank of classic six-operator FM patches stored in Plaits user data.

controls.harmonics: Selects a patch from the second built-in six-operator FM bank.
controls.timbre: Changes patch brightness by scaling operator levels.
controls.morph: Changes envelope timing and articulation across the operator network.
controls.macro: Detunes the modulator network, darkening below noon and saturating above it.

manual.trigger: Restarts the selected patch envelopes.

engines.name: DX7 Bank C
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: The third bank of classic six-operator FM patches stored in Plaits user data.

controls.harmonics: Selects a patch from the third built-in six-operator FM bank.
controls.timbre: Changes patch brightness by scaling operator levels.
controls.morph: Changes envelope timing and articulation across the operator network.
controls.macro: Detunes the modulator network, darkening below noon and saturating above it.

manual.trigger: Restarts the selected patch envelopes.

engines.name: Wave Terrain
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Two-dimensional navigation across a continuously changing terrain.

controls.harmonics: Selects the terrain or waveform family used by the two-dimensional scan.
controls.timbre: Moves the scan along the terrain's first axis.
controls.morph: Moves the scan along the terrain's second axis.
controls.macro: Offsets the Y-axis path to reveal complementary terrain contours.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: String Machine
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Divide-down ensemble strings with chord voicings and lush animation.

controls.harmonics: Selects chord voicing and harmonic registration.
controls.timbre: Changes the divide-down string registration and octave mixture.
controls.morph: Changes ensemble animation and timbral movement.
controls.macro: Moves ensemble depth from dry through the stock setting to fully wet.

manual.trigger: Restarts the internal envelope and rearticulates the string chord.

engines.name: Chiptune
engines.author: Emilie Gillet
engines.description: Three square-wave voices with arpeggiation and game-console grit.

controls.harmonics: Selects the chord or interval pattern of the square-wave voices.
controls.timbre: Changes arpeggiation rate and ordering.
controls.morph: Changes pulse shape and the balance of the chip voices.
controls.macro: Selects stepped register and inversion presets around the stock center step.

manual.trigger: Restarts the arpeggio and internal envelope when TRIG is patched.

engines.name: Glisson
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Overlapping grains trace randomized upward and downward pitch glides.

controls.harmonics: Spreads grain starting pitches around the played note.
controls.timbre: Changes the number of overlapping grains in the cloud.
controls.morph: Moves grain motion from downward chirps through static grains to upward chirps.
controls.macro: Changes grain duration and bends each pitch trajectory.

manual.trigger: Restarts and re-randomizes the grain cloud.

engines.name: GENDY
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: A waveform continuously rewritten by amplitude and duration random walks.

controls.harmonics: Changes the stochastic waveform from three to nine breakpoints.
controls.timbre: Changes the depth of the breakpoint amplitude random walk.
controls.morph: Changes the depth of the segment-duration random walk.
controls.macro: Moves interpolation from stepped through linear to smooth.

manual.trigger: Creates a new deterministic stochastic waveform.

engines.name: Scanned
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Scan across a slowly evolving network of coupled virtual masses.

controls.harmonics: Changes excitation width, stiffness, and alternating-mass inharmonicity.
controls.timbre: Changes mass irregularity and warps the spatial scan path.
controls.morph: Moves from damping into increasingly strong nonlinear wavefolding.
controls.macro: Changes the speed of the slowly evolving physical system.

manual.trigger: Strikes the virtual system; unpatched TRIG gently drives it continuously.

engines.name: Pulsar
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Windowed tone bursts move from sparse impulses to clustered formant rhythms.

controls.harmonics: Raises the carrier formant from the fundamental into tightly packed upper partials.
controls.timbre: Changes each pulsar window from a short impulse to a broad burst.
controls.morph: Increases the number of interleaved pulse clusters within each cycle.
controls.macro: Moves MAIN and AUX pulse peaks in opposite directions from early pluck to late swell.

manual.trigger: Restarts the pulsar cycle.

engines.name: Loopback
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: A normalized feedback-AM loop creates recursive sidebands without running away.

controls.harmonics: Selects the feedback modulation ratio.
controls.timbre: Raises recursion depth while the loop remains amplitude-normalized.
controls.morph: Changes the delay and feedback topology of the recursive loop.
controls.macro: Moves feedback symmetry from negative through bipolar to positive.

manual.trigger: Clears and rephases the feedback loop.

engines.name: Lockstep
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: An audible internal phase-locked loop hunts, slips, and captures harmonic ratios.

controls.harmonics: Selects the stepped ratio pursued by the internal phase-locked loop.
controls.timbre: Changes loop bandwidth from slow hunting to tight tracking.
controls.morph: Moves the phase detector from sinusoidal to increasingly wrapped behavior.
controls.macro: Changes capture range and damping around the selected lock ratio.

manual.trigger: Knocks the follower out of lock so it must reacquire the input ratio.

engines.name: Tapfield
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Pitch-clocked Galois feedback registers become repeating binary wavefields.

controls.harmonics: Selects a pitch-clocked feedback-register topology from 9 to 24 bits.
controls.timbre: Moves between equal, binary-weighted, and Gray-decoded bit fields.
controls.morph: Introduces deterministic corruption into the evolving register.
controls.macro: Smooths the decoded field from hard bit steps toward a slewed waveform.

manual.trigger: Restores a repeatable feedback-register seed.

engines.name: Phase Weave
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Four asymmetric harmonic voices weave through moving cancellation geometries.

controls.harmonics: Changes the asymmetric voice constellation and even/odd balance.
controls.timbre: Spreads relative phase among the four harmonic voices.
controls.morph: Moves the summed field from positive through bipolar cancellation.
controls.macro: Rotates the voice pairs and increases drive into the cancellation geometry.

manual.trigger: Rephases the harmonic voice bank.

engines.name: Sideband Bank
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Finite discrete-summation banks build compact geometric ladders above and below a carrier.

controls.harmonics: Changes spacing between the finite sideband partials.
controls.timbre: Changes the geometric amplitude rolloff across each sideband ladder.
controls.morph: Selects how many partials are retained in the finite sum.
controls.macro: Biases energy between the upper and lower sideband banks.

manual.trigger: Rephases both finite sideband banks.

engines.name: Attractor
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: A bounded three-state cyclic flow turns deterministic attractor motion into audio.

controls.harmonics: Changes the density and spacing of the attractor lobes.
controls.timbre: Moves the flow from damped motion into a more chaotic regime.
controls.morph: Scans the audible projection among the X, Y, and Z coordinates.
controls.macro: Skews coordinate integration rates to reshape the cyclic motion.

manual.trigger: Deterministically reseeds the three-state flow.

engines.name: Undertow
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Six integer undertones blend through original registrations and a warped divider lattice.

controls.harmonics: Moves through five interpolated undertone registrations.
controls.timbre: Changes the divider voices from triangle through BLEP saw to pulse.
controls.morph: Balances the pitch anchor against the undertone lattice.
controls.macro: Contracts or expands the deepest divider relationships.

manual.trigger: Phase-aligns all divider voices.

engines.name: Reed Pipe
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: A nonlinear reed excites a fractional-delay bore with a movable pressure pickup.

controls.harmonics: Moves the pressure pickup through the bore and changes its contribution.
controls.timbre: Raises breath pressure from soft excitation into nonlinear reed motion.
controls.morph: Changes reed stiffness and introduces breath noise.
controls.macro: Changes bore reflection loss and high-frequency brightness.

manual.trigger: Adds a brief pressure tongue to articulate the modeled pipe.

engines.name: Phase Flock
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Seven mean-field phase oscillators disperse, synchronize, and split into antipodal clusters.

controls.harmonics: Spreads the seven oscillators' natural frequencies.
controls.timbre: Raises mean-field coupling from dispersion toward synchronization.
controls.morph: Moves attraction from a single cluster toward antipodal two-cluster order.
controls.macro: Adds phase lag and frustration to the coupling field.

manual.trigger: Scatters the oscillator phases.

engines.name: Rulefield
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: Elementary cellular-automaton generations become evolving 32-cell wavecycles.

controls.harmonics: Selects the elementary cellular-automaton rule.
controls.timbre: Moves the wavecycle readout from cell states toward spatial edges.
controls.morph: Changes how quickly new cellular generations replace the current field.
controls.macro: Moves table lookup from stepped through linear to smooth interpolation.

manual.trigger: Restores the repeatable seed for the selected rule.

engines.name: Spectral Spiral
engines.author: Lyle Mills
engines.description: A complex delay loop repeatedly frequency-shifts an analytic harmonic source.

controls.harmonics: Changes the richness of the analytic harmonic source.
controls.timbre: Changes frequency-shift spacing on every trip around the complex loop.
controls.morph: Raises feedback to extend the spectral spiral through more rotations.
controls.macro: Moves the shift direction from downward through stationary to upward.

manual.trigger: Clears and rephases the complex feedback loop.
